raw.objective: “we investigated the population PK of total and unbound CBZ from a novel stable-labeled (SL) IV formulation.” and “to examine CBZ disposition in community-dwelling elderly and younger adult patients with epilepsy without interrupting therapy.”
raw.covariates: Tested: age, WT, BSA, IBW, LBW, race, sex, clinical centre, smoking, alcohol, grapefruit, AAG, albumin, total protein, unbound CBZ concentration Cu) Included: race on CL, WT on V1 and V2.
raw.observations: Bound and unbound CBZ concentrations were modelled side by side. WT did not influence CBZ CL. Only IV administration.
raw.structure: 2 comparment model for simultaneous bound and unbound drug, linear elimination, no absorption
raw.equations: [unbound CBZ PK] CL=theta1*(theta6**race)*exp(eta1) V1=theta3*WT*exp(eta2) Q=theta4*exp(eta3) V2=theta5*WT*exp(eta4) Fu=theta6*exp(eta5) if(TYPE==1) Cobs=Cipred*(1+eps1) #unbound concentrations if(TYPE==2) Cobs=(Cipred/Fu)*(1+eps2)+eps3 #correlation total to unbound concentrations
raw.parameter_values: theta1=11.2 theta2=142 theta3=444 theta4=175 theta5=0.25 theta6=1.30 omega1=0.104 omega2=0.046 omega3=1.78 omega4=0.055 omega5=0.036 sigma1=0.032 sigma2=0.024 sigma3=0.002

extraction_target.title: Population pharmacokinetics of unbound and total drug concentrations following intravenously administered carbamazepine in elderly and younger adult patients with epilepsy.

structural_model.description: 2 comparment model for simultaneous bound and unbound drug, linear elimination, no absorption

extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.objective: “we investigated the population PK of total and unbound CBZ from a novel stable-labeled (SL) IV formulation.” and “to examine CBZ disposition in community-dwelling elderly and younger adult patients with epilepsy without interrupting therapy.”

covariates.raw: Tested: age, WT, BSA, IBW, LBW, race, sex, clinical centre, smoking, alcohol, grapefruit, AAG, albumin, total protein, unbound CBZ concentration Cu) Included: race on CL, WT on V1 and V2.

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
